settings.title: Settings

appearance.separateDarkTheme: Use separate theme for dark mode

settings.showCloudInsertEntriesDesc: Add 'Insert Cloud Image/Audio/Video' options to the Format menu and right-click context menu.
settings.rulesHistoryCountHint: Number of history versions to keep per rules file (default: 10)

editor.showLineNumbers: Show Line Numbers in Source Mode

tabDesc.image: Configure cloud storage providers for image uploads.
tabDesc.publish: Configure publishing destinations for your documents. Push Markdown files to GitHub Pages, generate RSS feeds, or post to custom API endpoints.
tabDesc.export: Configure PDF export — page size, margins, fonts, and content toggles.

permissions.aiMaxTokensHint: Maximum number of tokens the AI can generate per response. Higher values allow longer responses and tool calls, but cost more.
permissions.aiToolResultMaxCharsHint: Maximum characters kept from each MCP tool result. Larger values preserve more detail but consume more context.
permissions.aiMaxToolRoundsHint: Maximum number of tool call rounds the AI can perform in a single conversation turn. Increase this for complex multi-step tasks.

voice.apiKeyOptional: Optional for AWS (use Access Key instead)
voice.recordingBackupHint: Save full recordings as WAV files after each session.
voice.voiceSyncHint: Sync voice profiles via cloud storage (e.g. iCloud, Dropbox). Use the Change button to pick a folder — existing profiles will be migrated automatically.
voice.noProfiles: No voice profiles yet. They are created automatically after transcription sessions.
voice.providersHint: Configure speech providers for voice transcription.

welcome.title: Welcome to Picora — one home for your media

commands.writeDesc: Write content based on your prompt
commands.continueDesc: Continue from where the text left off

prompts.emptyResponse: You returned an empty response. Please continue the task: either make the necessary tool call(s), or summarize what has been completed and list any remaining items. Do not return an empty message.
prompts.emptyResponseContinue:
Your last message was: "{lastMessage}"
Please continue from there.
prompts.truncationContinue: Your previous response was cut off due to output length limits. The text above has been saved. Now please complete the task by making the necessary tool call(s). Do not repeat the content — use it directly in the tool arguments.
prompts.continuationPrompt: Please continue and make the necessary tool call(s) to complete the task. Do not repeat what has already been said — proceed directly with the tool calls.
prompts.reviewContext:
---
This document has {count} pending review comments:
{items}
---
prompts.aiReviewRequest: Please review the current document and identify issues across four dimensions: logic, expression, fact, and structure. Use the write_ai_reviews tool to return up to 10 structured review comments. For each, provide markedText (an exact text fragment from the document being reviewed), comment (your review), and dimension (one of: logic, expression, fact, structure). If your model does not support tool calls, return the same data as a JSON code block.
prompts.aiRespondRequest:
The document contains this text:
"{markedText}"

The reviewer commented:
"{commentText}"

Please provide specific suggestions for revision. Do NOT modify the document — give suggestions only.

detection.intentPrefixes: I will|I'll|I need to|I should|I want to|Let me|Let's|I'm going to|I'm about to|First,? I|Now I|Next,? I

welcome.title: Welcome to Moraya
welcome.subtitle: A minimal, AI-ready Markdown editor.
welcome.tip: **Tip:** Press `Cmd+I` to toggle the AI assistant panel.
welcome.blockquoteContent: The art of writing is the art of discovering what you believe. — Gustave Flaubert
welcome.paragraph1: Moraya is a modern, lightweight Markdown editor built with Rust and Tauri. It combines the simplicity of a text editor with the power of a WYSIWYG interface, giving you the best of both worlds.
welcome.paragraph2: The name "Moraya" comes from combining "mora" (Latin for "a moment") with "ya" (Chinese for "elegance"), symbolizing elegant moments of writing.
welcome.paragraph3: Whether you're writing technical documentation, blog posts, academic papers, or personal notes, Moraya provides a distraction-free environment that lets you focus on what matters most — your content.
welcome.hrDescription: You can use horizontal rules to separate different sections of your document:

transcription.title: Transcription
transcription.emptyIdle: Click Start to begin recording and transcribing.
transcription.summarizePrompt: Please generate a meeting summary from the following transcript. Identify key discussion points, decisions made, and action items. Format as Markdown.
transcription.interviewSummarizePrompt: Please summarize the following interview transcript. Extract key questions, concise answer points, and optimization suggestions. Format as Markdown.
transcription.interviewNoAIConfig: No chat AI model configured. Please add one in Settings → AI.
transcription.interviewSystemShareHint: Interview mode follows the current audio source setting; screen sharing is requested only when System source is selected.
transcription.interviewNativeSystemHint: Interview mode follows the current audio source setting. On macOS, System and Mixed source use native system-audio capture instead of the screen-sharing dialog.
transcription.systemSourceRestartHint: Recording was stopped after switching to System/Mixed source. Click Start again to re-authorize and continue.
transcription.systemSourceClickStartHint: System source permission must be triggered from the Start button. Please click Start again.
transcription.systemSourcePermissionDenied: System source permission was denied. Allow screen sharing and enable audio sharing, then try again.
transcription.systemSourceNoAudioTrackHint: No system audio track was captured. In the share dialog, enable audio sharing and prefer Entire Screen; if your platform has no audio-share option, use Mic or Mixed source.
transcription.systemSourceUnsupportedHint: This environment does not expose a system-audio track in the share dialog. Source has auto-fallen back to Mic. For true system audio, use a native loopback capture path.
transcription.systemSourceNativeHint: macOS native system-audio capture is active. No screen-sharing dialog is required for System source.
transcription.systemSourceNativeMixedHint: macOS native system-audio capture is active. Mixed source combines native system audio with microphone input in-app.
transcription.systemSourceNativePermissionDenied: macOS denied native system-audio capture. Allow the app in System Settings → Privacy & Security, then try again.
transcription.systemSourceRuntimeIncompatible: This macOS runtime is not fully compatible with native system-audio capture. Update macOS or switch to Mic source.
transcription.noSpeechConfig: No speech provider configured. Please add one in Settings → Voice.
transcription.noSpeechConfigHint: Go to Settings → Voice to add a speech provider (e.g. Deepgram).
